ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft involved in the flight */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Start time of the flight */,
  "end_time" REAL /* End time of the flight */,
  "mission" TEXT /* Description of the flight's mission */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the flight */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircrafts ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircrafts" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "production_year" INTEGER /* Production year of the aircraft */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" REAL /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "query_string" TEXT /* Query string used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of environmental conditions */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight affected by these conditions */,
  "time" REAL /* Timestamp of the environmental conditions */,
  "localGravity_ft_s2" REAL /* Local gravity in feet per second squared */,
  "speedOfSound_ft_s" REAL /* Speed of sound in feet per second */,
  "airDensity_slug_ft3" REAL /* Air density in slugs per cubic foot */,
  "ambientPressure_lbf_ft2" REAL /* Ambient pressure in pounds per square foot */,
  "ambientTemperature_dgR" REAL /* Ambient temperature in degrees Rankine */,
  "windspeed_kts" REAL /* Wind speed in knots */,
  "wind_direction_deg" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "time" REAL /* Timestamp of the data quality metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the data quality metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the data quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight simulation */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "time" REAL /* Timestamp of the flight simulation */,
  "aircraft_model" TEXT /* Aircraft model used in the simulation */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions used in the simulation */,
  "scenario" TEXT /* Simulation scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_simulations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the aircraft involved in the flight
Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin)
